---
title : "Todos Somos de Clase Media: {{Sobre}} El Estatus Social Subjetivo En {{Chile}}"
date : "2013-01-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Miranda, Daniel & Cabib, Ignacio Madero"
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Latin American Research Review, 48(1) 155--173  [https://doi.org/10.1353/lar.2013.0006](https://doi.org/10.1353/lar.2013.0006)"
publication_short : "Latin American Research Review, 48(1) 155--173  [https://doi.org/10.1353/lar.2013.0006](https://doi.org/10.1353/lar.2013.0006)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Miranda, Daniel & Cabib, Ignacio Madero (2013). *Todos Somos de Clase Media: {{Sobre}} El Estatus Social Subjetivo En {{Chile}}*. Latin American Research Review, 48(1) 155--173  [https://doi.org/10.1353/lar.2013.0006](https://doi.org/10.1353/lar.2013.0006)

:::
